purpose: Stylesheet for the IDE Search Panel (.ide-search). Defines header (uppercase title + actions), input area (search/replace fields), filter toggles (case-sensitive/whole-word/regex/include/exclude), results tree with file headers and per-line match excerpts with match-highlight spans, plus empty/loading/no-results states.
gotchas: .ide-search-* prefix is consistent — preserve when adding rules.
Match highlight spans rely on inline backgrounds — selecting text across them may produce odd selection artifacts.
patterns: Uppercase 0.06em letter-spaced section titles consistent with ide-explorer.css.
Inline match highlights via styled <span> wrappers in result text.
